create_tilting_control.gui.tilting_prope: Each side of the bearing shows a colored gem, matching the columns above:
Set a Redstone Link frequency under a gem to bind that side.
Powering that frequency tilts the propeller toward its side. Scales with signal strength.
create_tilting_control.gui.tilting_swive: Each side of the bearing shows a colored gem, matching the columns above:
Set a Redstone Link frequency under a gem to bind that side.
Powering that frequency tilts the attached structure toward its side. Scales with signal strength.
Tilt directions follow the world compass, regardless of the swivel's rotation.
Tilt directions rotate with the contraption. Relative pitch to where it currently faces. Ideal for aiming.
block.create_tilting_control.tilting_pro: A _Propeller Bearing_ whose spinning propeller can be _tilted_ in any direction
When R-Clicked with an empty hand
Assembles the propeller contraption. Click again while running to disassemble.
Opens the configuration screen: Which contains the four link frequencies used for tilting controls, and some misc. configurations
When a side's Redstone Link is powered
Tilts the propeller toward that side. A _stronger signal_ means _more tilt_, up to _Max Tilt_. Opposing sides cancel out.
block.create_tilting_control.tilting_swi: A _Swivel Bearing_ whose simulated attached structure can additionally be _tilted_ in any direction, while still receiving _rotation_ through the bearing
When R-Clicked with an empty hand
Assembles the structure in front into a simulated contraption. Click again to disassemble.
Opens the configuration screen: Which contains the four link frequencies used for tilting controls, and some misc. configurations
When a side's Redstone Link is powered
Tilts the attached structure toward that side. A _stronger signal_ means _more tilt_, up to _Max Tilt_. Plain redstone next to the bearing controls the _swivel lock_
